section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor will perform a quick physical exam.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a future action/order (what the clinician plans to do), not an observed exam finding or result.

section_miscategorizations.text: The echocardiogram shows reduced heart pumping function and a leaky mitral valve.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence reports an imaging result, which belongs under objective findings rather than diagnostic impression/synthesis.
